MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS, LLC and BAY CLUB SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted. No opposition filed. Claims for punitive damages in paragraph 47 of Amended Complaint, and in prayer (page 9, item 5) are stricken. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
